---
name: New Review Rule
about: Suggest a new code pattern for GuardBot to catch
title: "[Rule] "
labels: "new rule, good first issue"
assignees: ""
---

**What should GuardBot catch?**
Describe the code pattern or anti-pattern.

**Example bad code**
```
// Bad
```

**Example good code**
```
// Good
```

**Severity**
- [ ] Critical (security vulnerability, data loss)
- [ ] Warning (likely bug, bad practice)
- [ ] Info (suggestion, improvement)

**Category**
- [ ] Security
- [ ] Bug
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Code Smell

**Language(s)**
JavaScript/TypeScript, Python, Go, etc.
